SolutionProviderRequest.title: Solution Provider Request
SolutionProviderRequest.description: Information provided by organizations wishing to join the wildfire resilient hub as solution providers.

contactName.description: The name of the primary contact person.

contactEmail.description: The email address of the contact person.

contactPhone.description: The phone number of the contact person.

organizationUrl.description: The website URL of the organization.

createdAt.description: The time the request was submitted.

/provider-requests/{requestId}.description: Collection of sign-up requests from potential solution providers.
